pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh which uses exactly these 5 seeds to generate the ground truth.
Confirmed via export_result.sh which uses '--random-depart-offset 120' to generate the ground truth.
Confirmed via export_result.sh which uses this path to generate the ground truth, and setup_sumo.sh which maps the real Bologna Acosta dataset here.
Confirmed via export_result.sh which checks for the agent's tripinfo XML files in this directory.
Confirmed via export_result.sh which looks for the agent's final JSON report at this exact path.

privileged_info_summary: The correct parameters for the SUMO simulation are seeds [1001, 1002, 1003, 1004, 1005] and a depart offset of 120. Execution of the ground truth generator script (export_result.sh) against the Bologna Acosta scenario verifies that across these 5 runs, there are exactly 43895 total completed trips, an overall mean trip duration of approximately 279.04 seconds, and a 95th percentile duration of exactly 507.0 seconds. The agent's final JSON report must be saved to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/reliability_report.json.
